meta.siteTitle: Villa Sarita · Premium ecolodge in Tumaco, Colombia
meta.siteDescription: Five cabins in a natural retreat on Colombia's Pacific coast. Cross the door to your connection. Book direct, no middlemen.
meta.ogImageAlt: Villa Sarita · Premium ecolodge in Tumaco on the Colombian Pacific

home.title: Villa Sarita · Premium cabins in Tumaco, Colombian Pacific
home.description: Book direct at Villa Sarita: five private cabins in a natural retreat on Colombia's Pacific coast. From an intimate retreat for two to a studio for six. No middlemen.

cabanas.title: The five cabins · Villa Sarita in Tumaco
cabanas.description: Five private cabins at Villa Sarita, Tumaco: one for couples, two for families, and two larger options for up to six guests. Capacity, amenities, and direct booking.

meta.cabanaDetailDescription: {tagline}. A cabin at Villa Sarita, a premium ecolodge in Tumaco on the Colombian Pacific. Book direct, no middlemen.

experiencia.title: Experiences · Birthdays, weddings & picnics at Villa Sarita
experiencia.description: Every celebration is prepared with care in a private natural setting. Birthdays, weddings, quinceañeras, picnics, and couple's nights at Villa Sarita, Tumaco.

meta.experienciaDetailDescription: {tagline}. An experience prepared at Villa Sarita, a premium ecolodge in Tumaco on the Colombian Pacific.

ubicacion.title: How to get to Villa Sarita · Tumaco, Nariño
ubicacion.description: Villa Sarita sits in Barrio Cordialidad, Tumaco (Nariño). 45 minutes by flight from Cali, or 6 hours by road from Pasto. Map, address, and directions.

reservar.title: Book · Villa Sarita Tumaco
reservar.description: Book your cabin at Villa Sarita with a 20% deposit. Instant confirmation, balance paid on arrival.

home.heroKicker: Cross the door to your connection
home.heroSubtitle: A retreat on the Colombian Pacific
home.heroBlurb: Villa Sarita offers a premium experience of rest and connection with nature, where every guest steps into immediate calm upon entering — enjoying private cabins, attentive hosting, and natural settings designed for wellbeing and intimate celebrations.
home.value1Body: From the moment you arrive, you leave behind the noise, the rush, and the routine to enter a space where calm, silence, and nature take center stage.
home.value2Title: Privacy and exclusivity at the heart of nature
home.value2Body: Enjoy private cabins, intimate spaces, and a protected natural setting designed for those seeking real rest. Far from mass tourism, Villa Sarita offers an experience where true luxury lives in calm, comfort, and the freedom to live every moment your way.
home.value3Body: More than a stay, Villa Sarita is a place to share and celebrate. Bonfires under the stars, outdoor picnics, special dinners, and personal attention create authentic moments that strengthen bonds and turn into unforgettable memories.
home.cabanasTitle: A cabin for every kind of trip
home.cabanasBlurb: From an intimate retreat for two to a self-contained studio for six. Each one with its own feel, all in the same natural setting.
home.experienceBlurb: Every celebration is prepared with care, in a private natural setting. Birthdays, weddings, picnics, quinceañeras and more. Browse the experiences we've created and pick yours.
home.locationBlurb: Barrio Cordialidad, in Tumaco (Nariño). A natural retreat on the Colombian Pacific — away from the noise, close to the sea.

cabanas.indexBlurb: Five cabins for different kinds of trips: one for couples, two for families, and two larger options for up to six guests.

booking.eventToggleHelp: Birthdays, anniversaries, bachelorettes, special dinners… message us on WhatsApp and we'll sort it.
booking.eventOn: Yes, I want to celebrate something
booking.eventWhatsappHelp: Tell us on WhatsApp what you'd like to celebrate. We confirm availability and lock in the details directly with the host.
booking.eventWhatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in booking a cabin at Villa Sarita and I'd like to celebrate an event during my stay. Could you help me with availability and the details?
booking.balanceHelp: 20% is paid now to secure the booking. The remaining 80% is paid on arrival — cash, Nequi, or bank transfer.
booking.whatsappHint: No email needed. Your host will confirm the details and payment by WhatsApp.
booking.ctaHint: Fill in dates, name and phone to continue.
booking.errorGeneric: We couldn't process the booking. Try again or message us on WhatsApp.

confirmation.label: booking confirmed
confirmation.title: Done! Your cabin is booked
confirmation.subtitle: We received your deposit. We'll message you on WhatsApp to confirm the details.
confirmation.balanceHelp: Paid on arrival at Villa Sarita — cash, Nequi, or bank transfer.

experience.label: experiences
experience.title: Experiences at Villa Sarita
experience.blurb: Each experience is prepared with care, in a private natural setting. Birthdays, weddings, picnics, quinceañeras and more. Pick the one that calls to you.

location.label: how to get there
location.title: Tumaco, Nariño
location.blurb: Villa Sarita sits in Barrio Cordialidad, Tumaco (Nariño), on the Colombian Pacific. Tumaco airport connects to Cali (45-min flight). By road, it's about 6 hours from Pasto.
location.addressHelp: Carrera 18, Barrio Cordialidad — Tumaco, Nariño. Find us on Google Maps as "Cabañas Villa Sarita". We share the exact location by WhatsApp once the booking is confirmed.

footer.slogan: Cross the door to your connection
footer.tagline: Premium ecolodge on the Colombian Pacific

whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hi, I saw your Villa Sarita site and I'd like to make a booking.
